question: List the unique school IDs for schools that received a school grant of 18000 during the 2018 academic year, ensuring that only schools associated with exactly one record for that academic year are included, and order the results by the unique school ID.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID FROM DIM_SCHOOL AS T1 JOIN FACT_SCHOOL_FINANCES AS T2 ON T1.SCHOOL_ID = T2.SCHOOL_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T3 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T3.YEAR_ID WHERE T3.ACADEMIC_YEAR IN ('2018') AND T2.SCHOOL_GRANT_RECEIVED = 18000 GROUP BY T1.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T3.ACADEMIC_YEAR) = 1 ORDER BY T1.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID
predicted_sql:
SELECT ds.UNIQUE_SCHOOL_ID
FROM FACT_SCHOOL_FINANCES fsf
JOIN DIM_YEAR dy ON fsf.YEAR_ID = dy.YEAR_ID
JOIN DIM_SCHOOL ds ON fsf.SCHOOL_ID = ds.SCHOOL_ID
